title: Pixelmon
description: Pixelmon adds many aspects of the Pokémon into Minecraft, including the Pokémon themselves, battling, trading, and breeding. Pixelmon also includes an assortment of new items, including prominent items like Poké Balls and TMs, new resources like bauxite ore and Apricorns, and new decorative blocks like chairs and clocks.
body:
Click here for a discount with Nodecraft for your first Pixelmon server!

Click me for The Pixelmon Modpack on Modrinth, for a recommended setup.

 

Embark on the Ultimate Pokémon Adventure in Minecraft!

Enjoy the Number 1 Pokémon in Minecraft experience like never before! For over a decade, Pixelmon has redefined what it means to "Gotta Catch 'Em All" in Minecraft, and we’re just getting started.

With relentless dedication to the player experience, we’re constantly expanding your journey with new features, jaw-dropping structures, and thrilling adventures created by our dedicated and talented team.

Step Into the World of Pixelmon

The Official Pixelmon Modpack is your gateway to the most authentic Pokémon experience in Minecraft, featuring:

  • Every Pokémon up to Generation 9, meticulously crafted with handmade models & smooth animations by our elite artists!
  • 1,000+ Pokémon to collect, train, and battle with friends, build your dream team and prove your mastery!
  • A living, breathing world with dozens of custom structures, from sprawling towns offering opportunities to challenge powerful Gym Leaders, epic Dynamax Dens, and many more exciting experiences to encounter!
  • Fully optimized for Minecraft 1.21, blending Pixelmon’s magic with the expansive Caves & Cliffs terrain, every biome holding a new discovery!

Every Generation & More

Play with every single Pokémon from Generations 1 through 9, recreated with handcrafted models and smooth animations. All our assets are made by our fantastic team of artists, capturing every detail.

From the nostalgic charm of Kanto to the vibrant energy of Paldea, this is the world of Pokémon in open-world gameplay. Whether you're battling, exploring, or just admiring your favorites, experience the magic of Pokémon in Minecraft: lovingly crafted, beautifully animated, and ready for your newest adventure.

Encounter rare Pokémon with unique appearances. These Pixelmon-exclusive forms, such as the seasonal Summer, Halloween, Christmas or Valentine-themed Pokémon, and others like the Ashen, Strike & Spirit Pokémon can be found all over the world.

Can you catch 'em all?

Towns, Gyms & Trainer Facilities

Visit functional Poké Centers to heal your team, stock-up at Poké Marts, and explore villages for resources and trading. Lovingly built by our team artists, enter type-inspired towns, such as the Grass Gym Town, to collect rewards.

Take on intense Gym Battles in themed arenas that test your skills, strategy, and team building. Adventure into the wilds to encounter legendary Pokémon shrines, ancient ruins and treasure-filled grottos. It’s everything you love about Pokémon, reimagined in a blocky, endless world where you make the journey your own.

Research, Breeding & Progression

Become the ultimate Pokémon Trainer by completing your regional and themed Pokédex, documenting every species and its variants!

Visit towns and assist Professor Wisteria with research quests inspired by Pokémon GO. Complete tasks, uncover mysteries, and earn special rewards by exploring and tracking down rare Pokémon. Want to build the perfect team? Drop your Pokémon off at the Daycare to hatch powerful new partners through breeding, unlocking unique moves and ideal stats.

Whether you're a collector, battler, or strategist, our Pixelmon features are designed to keep you engaged, progressing, and discovering more.

Train, Battle & Become a Pixelmon Master

Experience the ultimate in Pokémon combat with Mega Evolutions, Z-Moves, Dynamaxing, Horde Battles, Raid Dens and more!

Trigger Mega Evolutions to unlock fierce new forms, unleash Z-Moves with perfect timing, or go gigantic with Dynamaxing to shake the field with massive power. Face off against swarms in intense Horde Battles or challenging bosses in Raid Dens, testing your tactics and team skills.

From single duels to chaotic group clashes, embrace the thrill of Pixelmon battling where we recreate beloved Pokémon battle mechanics!

Play Your Way

Limitless adventures await! Will you conquer every Gym and collect their badges? Dominate Dynamax battles? Raise your team from an egg with Daycare? Or simply wander the wilds, filling your Pokédex with rare and powerful friends and favourites? The choice is yours!

Download the Official Pixelmon Modpack today and become the very best, like no-one ever was!

 

The Pixelmon Mod OST
